rootCause: Playwright preview builds run frontend-only `npm run build`, which does not stamp runtime build metadata. The chat page fetches `/build-meta.json`; when metadata is missing the endpoint returns 503, producing console errors that fail nav smoke checks.
resolution: Seeded `VITE_GIT_SHA=local-e2e-build` in frontend test environment setup so local/CI E2E preview runs always expose a non-placeholder build SHA and `/build-meta.json` returns 200.
